case_title: PETER MURRAY VS. OLD REPUBLIC SURETY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC SURETY COMPANY

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MURRAY, PETER DBA AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC SURETY COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURRAY, PETER DBA AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC SURETY COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-01-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-01-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-02-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTFF PETER MURRY IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY PANFILO ARMAS, A FOREMAN AT PLAINTIFF COMPANY. MR. ARMAS INFORMS THE COURT THAT THE PLAINTIFF IS ILL AND UNABLE TO ATTEND THE HEARING. DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC SURETY COMPANY IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY LISA FRASIER, CLAIMS DIRECTOR. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC SURETY COMPANY
